steps.title: Find the contrast
steps.content: The text says some modernist periodicals, such as The Dial, have been explored in depth. It then says Voices remains a periodical about which relatively little is known.

steps.title: Reject similarity signals
steps.content: A signals similarity, B adds a reinforcing point, and D introduces an example. The sentence needs a contrast transition because Voices is in the opposite scholarly situation from The Dial. The answer is C.
